name: The Xchat app release will be the biggest app release of the year on the App Store and one of the biggest tech releases by Elon in the last decade. It is also the first-ever full app outside of X. In the first 72 hours after the global release, Elon is definitely going to launch one of the biggest marketing campaigns of this year. In this case, the OG Xchat meme coin has everything it needs to hit 20-50M MC — especially with the ETH community featuring Asteroid on a background. Join the CTO community and be a part of history.

name: Ancient Aliens
description:
Ancient aliens are believed to have once guided early human civilizations, leaving a lasting influence that became myth over time. Now, some speculate that Bitcoin and its mysterious creator Satoshi Nakamoto may represent a return of that advanced knowledge.

The concept behind $ALIENS builds on this idea, combining past influence with future innovation to inspire a community focused on curiosity, belief, and creating something beyond current understanding.

name: Ping Ping Fu Shuang $平平福双 The internet’s next viral obsession is here! In the middle of high global tensions, China just dropped the ultimate cuteness bomb: Ping Ping (平平) and Fu Shuang (福双) from Chengdu Research Base are heading to Zoo Atlanta for a 10-year stay. Announced just weeks before President Trump’s planned visit to Beijing, this adorable duo is sparking massive panda diplomacy vibes and flooding timelines with heart-melting clips.Expect Moo Deng / Punch-level vibes. The Panda-mania is loading...
